title: Min Doktor - Swedish Digital Primary Care Platform
problem: Access to primary care is limited by geography, time, and traditional clinic hours. Patients need faster, more convenient healthcare access.
solution: Digital healthcare platform providing 24/7 online consultations with doctors, psychologists, and nurses. Also offers vaccinations at pharmacy locations (Apotek Hjärtat).
technology: Telemedicine, video consultations, digital booking, pharmacy integration
target_customer: Patients seeking primary care, employers, health systems
traction_signals: Partnership with Apotek Hjärtat for vaccination services
regulatory_notes: Operates under Swedish healthcare regulations. All clinicians are licensed.
varden_fit: HIGH - Direct competitor in some areas but potential partner in others. Min Doktor has built patient-facing telemedicine; Varden has built clinic/provider tools. Complementary rather than competitive. Interesting for B2B employer model.
notes: Key Swedish digital health player. Physical presence through pharmacy partnerships is interesting hybrid model. Research: user numbers, employer partnerships, revenue model.
